name: Apricot Bagel
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients in the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Use the dough setting.
3. Add the apricots 5 minutes before the end of the kneading phase or work them into the dough before shaping.
4. If you don't have a dough setting, stop the machine after the rises.
5. Prepare baking sheets or use nonstick sheets.
6. Remove dough from the machine and punch it down.
7. Roll out the dough into a rectangle about 14 x 18 inches.
8. Divide into equal pieces and shape into bagel form or use a cutter.
9. Place the bagels on the sheets and let them rise again. Provide a draft-free location in the oven for this step.
10. Boil water (3-4 inches deep) in a 4 to 6-quart soup pot.
11. Add 2 tablespoons malt syrup, honey, sugar, or non-diastatic malt powder to the boiling water and return it to a boil.
12. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
13. Drop bagels one at a time into the boiling water, simmer each side for about 1 minute, and return them to the baking sheet.
14. Add glazes or toppings as desired.
15. Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown (20-25 minutes). Start checking at 15 minutes for the first batch.
16. These are best eaten while warm; they can be frozen if sliced first for toaster use.
